---
title: "fromIDBTransaction()"
description: "Wrap an IndexedDB transaction lifecycle as a terminal-only source. Success emits COMPLETE without DATA: undefined is the TypeScript SENTINEL and cannot be a DATA payload under R-data-payload."
---

<!-- generated by website/scripts/gen-api-docs.mjs; do not edit -->

Wrap an IndexedDB transaction lifecycle as a terminal-only source.

Success emits COMPLETE without DATA: undefined is the TypeScript SENTINEL and cannot be a DATA
payload under R-data-payload.

## Import

```ts
import { fromIDBTransaction } from "@graphrefly/ts/sources/browser";
```

## Signature

```ts
function fromIDBTransaction(transaction: IDBTransactionLike): Operator<never, never>
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `transaction` | `IDBTransactionLike` | transaction value used by the helper. |

## Returns

A Operator<never, never> value for the boundary or adapter.

## Example

```ts
import { fromIDBTransaction } from "@graphrefly/ts/sources/browser";
```

## Source

`packages/ts/src/sources/browser.ts`
